$statusLegend.ported: byte-equivalent to upstream (CI fails on drift)
$statusLegend.adapted: TypeScript port and/or namespace swap; logically equivalent
$statusLegend.extended: fork adds behavior on top of upstream
$statusLegend.added: file unique to the fork (no upstream)

files.notes: name + textdomain swapped to artisanpack namespace; attributes/supports verbatim.

TypeScript port. Omits the blob-URL upload path (useUploadMediaFromBlobURL) and the URL → embed-block upgrade (createUpgradedEmbedBlock) — both depend on block-library internals not exposed via the package's exports field. Inline RichText replaces the shared Caption component for the same reason.
TypeScript port; behaviour byte-equivalent to upstream.
Upstream files + shortcode transforms preserved; added bidirectional core/audio ↔ artisanpack/audio block transforms.
Sass caption-style() mixin inlined. data-type selectors not needed (none in upstream).
Inline SVG for the inserter (matches @wordpress/icons audio path).
Adapted to the visual-editor auto-discovery contract; upstream init.js / index.php server-side wiring is intentionally absent.

knownDivergences: edit.tsx omits the upstream blob-URL upload mount-effect (useUploadMediaFromBlobURL). Practical impact: drag-and-dropped audio files are not eagerly uploaded as soon as they hit the block; the user uploads via MediaPlaceholder or MediaReplaceFlow as usual.

edit.tsx omits the audio-URL → embed-block upgrade (createUpgradedEmbedBlock). Practical impact: pasting a SoundCloud/Spotify URL into the audio URL field does not auto-convert to an embed block; users insert the embed block directly.

edit.tsx uses an inline RichText figcaption instead of the upstream shared Caption component. Practical impact: the toolbar/caption-toggle affordance Caption provides is replaced by always-showing the figcaption when selected or non-empty.
